# Assurgit

> AI-powered video content system for businesses. 7 branded videos per week using your avatar and voice clone — researched, scripted, and published on autopilot.

## What Assurgit Does

Assurgit is a done-for-you AI video content service. Businesses get up to 7 professionally produced, fully branded videos every week without filming. Each video uses a personalized AI avatar and voice clone (built from a 30-minute setup session) to look and sound exactly like the business owner or spokesperson.

The system:
- Monitors each client's competitive landscape weekly
- Writes platform-optimized scripts for Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, and YouTube
- Renders videos using HeyGen avatar and voice clone technology
- Adds captions, formatting, and branding
- Publishes directly to all platforms (Growth and Scale plans)
- Sends a weekly competitive intelligence briefing

## Plans

- **Starter** — $1,997/month — 7 AI videos/week delivered as MP4s
- **Growth** — $3,497/month — 7 videos/week + auto-publishing to 4 platforms + competitive intelligence
- **Scale** — $5,997/month — Everything in Growth + Friday strategy call + priority support

All plans are month-to-month with no contracts.

## Who It's For

Small businesses, coaches, consultants, service providers, and entrepreneurs who want consistent video presence on social media but don't have time to film, script, or edit content.

## Technology

- Avatar and voice clone: HeyGen
- Research pipeline: Custom AI system monitoring competitor content, trending topics, and keyword opportunities
- Script writing: AI-assisted with human review
- Publishing: Direct integration with Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube

## Free Tools

- **AI Video Hook Generator** (https://assurgit.com/tools/hook-generator) — Generate 8 platform-specific hooks for any video topic using AI
- **AI Video Tool Rankings** (https://assurgit.com/tools/ai-video-tools) — Rankings and comparisons of 13 AI video creation tools
